# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2c
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.10.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.20.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b

  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.30.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2c

  RouteTablePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnetsRouteTable

  RouteTablePrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId:
        Ref: VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetsRouteTable

  RouteToInternet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePublic
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId:
        Ref: InternetGateway

  SubnetRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId:
        Ref: PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePublic

  SubnetRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId:
        Ref: PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePublic

  SubnetRoute3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId:
        Ref: PublicSubnet3
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePublic

  SubnetPrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId:
        Ref: PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePrivate

  SubnetPrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId:
        Ref: PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePrivate

  SubnetPrivateRoute3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId:
        Ref: PrivateSubnet3
      RouteTableId:
        Ref: RouteTablePrivate

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: The ID of the created VPC
    Value:
      Ref: VPC
  PublicSubnets:
    Description: The IDs of the public subnets
    Value:
      Fn::GetAtt: [PublicSubnet1, SubnetId]
      Fn::Join:
        - ','
        - -
          - !Ref PublicSubnet2
          - !Ref PublicSubnet3
  PrivateSubnets:
    Description: The IDs of the private subnets
    Value:
      Fn::GetAtt: [PrivateSubnet1, SubnetId]
      Fn::Join:
        - ','
        - -
          - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
          - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
